blended.narrative: Killington is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 7,278 ft. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 42°F.

Sunday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
